title: reservations RMW under store lock + session auto-derive (D2+D3)
action: FREEZE FIRST: existing reservation rows in test_lib/test_bee_cli green, record. Per D2: wrap reserve/release/sweep read-check-write bodies in withStoreLock(root,reservations,fn); conflict check runs INSIDE the lock. Per D3: when --session absent, reserve resolves via resolveSessionId (msh-2 helper) so top-level-session reserves become cross-session-visible by default; a truly absent id still writes session-less row (today-compatible). Typed LOCK_BUSY surfaces holder. Forked-racer scripts/test_reservation_race.mjs: N concurrent reserves distinct paths -> N rows survive; same path -> 1 winner + typed conflicts; child-orchestrator pattern. Manifest --write + --check.

truths: no reservation silently lost under concurrency
hooks still never take the lock
prohibitions: no hook edits in this cell

verify: node scripts/test_reservation_race.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: reserve/release/sweepExpired now run their read-check-write body inside withStoreLock('reservations') (D2), with the conflict check re-read fresh under the lock; reserve() self-derives session via resolveSessionId (D3) when --session is absent, so top-level-session reserves become cross-session-visible by default while a genuinely-absent id still writes a session-less row. Forked-racer scripts/test_reservation_race.mjs proves: N distinct-path reserves all survive, N same-path reserves produce exactly 1 winner + typed conflicts naming the holder, and a deliberate-red unlocked proxy reproduces the pre-fix lost-update. main()/handler dispatch made async to actually await the now-async reservation verbs through the real CLI.
deviations: Deviation rule 3 (blocking issue in the verify path, auto-fix): wrapping reserve()/release()/sweepExpired() in withStoreLock made them async; their only callers outside the cell's own file list are the CLI handlers in bee.mjs (already in scope) and 19 direct call sites in skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs, which is NOT in the cell's declared files but IS exercised by the cell's own verify command. Left un-awaited, those 19 sites would silently receive Promises instead of results and the freeze-first suite would go red. Added await to all 19 call sites.

Deviation rule 3 (blocking issue, auto-fix): D3's session auto-derive (resolveSessionId falling back to process.env.CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID) collided with two existing test_lib.mjs assertions that assumed 'no --session passed' always means a session-less row, regardless of env -- true before D3, no longer true when the test process itself is a live bee worker session (which it always is in normal operation). Isolated CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID (save/clear/restore, the same pattern the file already uses at its own resolveSessionId test) around the two affected reserve() calls so the 'legacy/session-less' fixtures stay genuinely session-less, matching the intended D3 contract ('a genuinely absent id -- no flag, no env -- still writes a session-less row') rather than the pre-D3 behavior.

Also made main() async and updated the direct-run guard (process.exitCode assignment -> main(...).then(...)) since the dispatcher awaits handler(root, flags) uniformly -- required plumbing for reservations.reserve/release/sweep to actually be awaited through the real CLI path, not a redesign: main() had exactly one caller (the direct-run guard) and no other importer in the repo, so the blast radius is contained to this file.
trace.verify_output: test_reservation_race: PASS (a) 8 distinct-path racers -> all 8 rows survived; (b) 8 same-path racers -> 1 winner + 7 typed conflicts naming winner; (c) deliberate-red unguarded proxy lost a row (detector bites). test_lib.mjs: 359 passed, 0 failed. test_lib_mirror.mjs: 4/4 PASS (templates/lib and .bee/bin/lib byte-identical, 22 files; hook inventory byte-identical, 10 files). release_manifest --check: 364 file(s) match stored manifest.
trace.verify_command: node scripts/test_reservation_race.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check
